title: MCEconomy
description: Basic economy plugin a your minecraft server
body:
Key features:
- YAML and MySQL support for storing balances and transactions.
- Auto-save data at a specified interval.
- Managing the balance of players.
- Transfer of money between players.
- Administrative operations (issuance, installation, withdrawal of money).
- Vault support for compatibility with other plugins.
- PlaceholderAPI support for displaying balance in chat or other plugins.
- Record all transactions (player-to-player, administrative actions).
- Color messages in the console and chat.
